handoff.reason: Workorder created from STUB-FAILING-TESTS-TRIAGE-001. Triage complete at create-time: 30 skips are all known-gap describe.skip blocks (chroma/pinecone/ollama), 1 flaky test (scanner-export recursive). Plan: fix flaky test, add skip comments where missing, confirm 0 failures.

hard_constraints: Do not remove describe.skip without providing the infrastructure the tests require
Do not weaken assertions to fix the flaky test — fix the race condition
Total skip count must remain 30 after fix (no new skips added)

decisions_log.rationale: Stub category: test → light. Single-phase triage + targeted fix.

decisions_log.finding: 30 'failures' are describe.skip blocks (known-gap, all pre-existing). 1 flaky test: scanner-export > should support recursive option (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND parallel worker race).

communication_log.note: WO-FAILING-TESTS-TRIAGE-001 created from STUB-FAILING-TESTS-TRIAGE-001. Triage performed during workorder creation: 30 skips = describe.skip on chroma-store (13), pinecone-store (12), ollama-provider-unreachable (5) — all intentional infrastructure gaps. 1 flaky: scanner-export > should support recursive option.
